subcodes.first_line: O friends! This is the Day whereon each one of the loved ones must arise to aid the All-Merciful, for most [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان امروز روزی است که هر یک از محبان بنصرت رحمن برخیزند چه که اکثر من
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution
